snippet.title: Dhurandhar The Revenge Official Hindi Trailer | Ranveer S | Aditya D | In Cinemas 19 March 2026
snippet.description:
Ab Pakistan ka mustakbil, Hindustan tay karega
Dhurandhar The Revenge Trailer Out Now.  Book Now for Paid Previews on 18th March only.

Releasing worldwide on 19 March, on Gudi Padwa, Ugadi, and Eid.

Jio Studios presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE 

Written, Directed and Produced by Aditya Dhar
Produced by Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by Lokesh Dhar

Trailer Scored, Composed and Produced by Shashwat Sachdev

Ari Ari Song Credits: 
Composed, Arranged and Programmed by Shashwat Sachdev
Vocals: Navtej Singh Rehal (Bombay Rockers), Khan Saab, Jasmine Sandlas & Sudhir Yaduvanshi
Rap Performed and written by Reble, Token 
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil, Bombay Rockers
Score Producer Adam Lucas
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma

Director of Photography - Vikash Nowlakha
Editor: Shivkumar V. Panicker
Music and Background Score: Shashwat Sachdev
Casting Director: Mukesh Chhabra, CSA
Executive Producer: Rahul H. Gandhi
Character & Prosthetics Designer: Preetisheel Singh Dâ€™Souza
Sound Designer: Bishwadeep Chatterjee
Costume Designer: Smriti Chauhan
Action Directors: Aejaz Gulab, Sea Young Oh, Yannick Ben, Ramazan Bulut
Choreographer: Vijay Ganguly
Additional Screenplay: Shivkumar V. Panicker, Ojas Gautam
Additional Production Designer: Rupin Suchak
Associate Director & Second Unit Director: Rohun Rege
Chief Assistant Director: Sameer Sadhwani
Directorâ€™s Assistant: Ojas Gautam
Creative Producer: Aarsh Vora
Assistant Producer: Shweta Vora
Line Producer: Naseer Ahmed Khan
Research Consultant: Aditya Raj Kaul, Dibya S.
Associate Editor: Sumit Dhole, Juhi Gopalakrishnan
Marketing Manager: Chelsea Gupta
Production Sound Mixers: Manas Bal, Prabal Pradhan
Post Producer: Gautmik
Re-Recording Mixer: Justin Jose K (CAS)
VFX Supervisor: Dhruti Ranjan Sahoo
VFX Studios: Envision VFX, Philm CGI, Redefine, R2 VFX
DI Studio: Redefine
DI Colourist: Ashirwad Hadkar (ISC)
Digital Agency: White Rivers Media
PR Agency: Communique Film PR
Marketing Agency: MAX Marketing Ltd
Teaser and Trailer Editor: Ojas Gautam
Dubbing & Localization: Annapurna Studios
Visual Promotion: Jayesh Shikarkhane & Team
Publicity Design: Ma & Th (Marching Ants & Trigger Happy)

Jio Studios Team
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production and Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.description:
Final stop. Final energy. Final chapter of a journey weâ€™ll never forget.
ClassX Rush Live Final EP

Vek âœ–ï¸ڈ Swar â€” two voices, one stage, one powerful moment.
This is not just a live session, this is the closing of a story built with passion, pressure, practice, and pure love for music.

From the first beat to the last note, this final episode carries everything we believe in  raw performance, real emotion, and real connection with the crowd.
No filters. No shortcuts. Just music, movement, and memories made on stage.

Thank you to everyone who supported the journey, watched every episode, shared the clips, and believed in what we are building.
This one is for the culture.
This one is for the grind.
This one is for the people who never stopped listening.

Lyrics:

My king, when your color touched me

Tune: I mixed cannabis in the air

When my lover sprayed water on me, I killed him.

The slut became my neighbor's sister-in-law. (x2)

Why are you cursing about 'no vacancy'?
When the room in your heart is empty.

I know what you want.
You said your prayers.
Your intention is Qawwali.

You've become the key to every lock today, right?

The tune of "Balam Pichkari" killed me.
The simple, sari-clad girl became a drunkard.
Yes, the tune that struck me while I was wearing jeans,
Then I became the neighbor's sister-in-law (x2)

Yes, I said, the world has become barren.
Yes, I said, the world has become barren...

snippet.title: Aspirants Season 3 - Official Trailer | Prime Video India
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Aspirants Season 3 Official Trailer 
Starring Naveen Kasturia, Sunny Hinduja, Jatin Goswami, Abhilash Thapliyal, Shivankit Singh Parihar, Namita Dubey, Tengam Celine
Directed by Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
The Viral Fever Production

Official Release Date - March 13, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Inquiry begins on DM Abhilash after ALC Sandeep Ohlanâ€™s allegations putting his personal relationship with Deepa, Guri, Dhairya, SK & Sandeep at stake and disrupting his professional goals against a new rival. While the young Abhilash, after having qualified for IRS, decides to attempt for IAS one final time preparing from Mukherjee Nagar among some new friends & foes.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages â€“ including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal â€“ The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Videoâ€™s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures â€“ Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Can I Save Her From THE PROTOTYPE ?  (Poppy Playtime Chapter 5)
snippet.description:
Today we play Poppy Playtime Chapter 5 in which we are stuck in a Toy Factory. We run from Huggy Wuggy to escape this abandoned Toy Factory!

my insta - https://www.instagram.com/mythpat

I love this horror game! I have become CATNAP and I have to Defeat Prototype. This is the best Horror Hindi Game!

#poppyplaytime #catnap #huggywuggy #horror #gaming

snippet.title: TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. itsriken
snippet.description:
TIMRO LOOKS - Rinmorin ft. KBABI (Official Music Video) Prod. Itsriken 
âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯âژ¯
â€œTIMRO LOOKSâ€‌ is a rap song with a flirty mood, talking about that one girl whose looks and vibe keep running through my mindâ™ھ

Official Audio - https://youtu.be/hMIDW5HUY08?si=OMalmwP6kpg-L5n5

lyrics...

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER 
                     X2

Rinmorin - Verse 
HEJO SAAMA MALAI BAAL THYNA 
KASAI KO YHA JABA TIMLAI DEKHY MERO 
MUKH BATA DAMM GRIL 

LUKI LUKI HERNY BANI LAGYO TIMI LAI 
MA NAJIKINA KHOJE TARA KADA UMRYO JHYAN VAARRR

HALKA GARIDAUNA BATH 
ABO CHAIYO TIMRO SAATH DIYE 
CHODINA YO HAAT JHUTO  BOLE 
VANY MARI JAAUU

MUTU VETRA JAMMA 4 WOTA THAU 
HUNXA 
2 THAUMA TIMI RA MAH  2 THAUMA 
AAMA BAAU

RAKHI SAKE TIMLAI AARU VANDA MATHI 
AAKHA LAUNY TORI HARKO HAAT KHUTAA
VAACHDINXU MAAA

AARU VANDA NIKAI FARK XU MAH BAAL SANGAI  BUDHI ANI BAAG JASTI AATI XU MAAH 
TIMI 
XAUMA HUDA KAILY AATIN XA MAANN
JHUTO BOLYA HOINA  NASALU CHJJJ KHADINA MA
JALMA
 PARISAKE KEBAL HAAT DINUU LAAAA
ABO BAKI KURA PANDIT LAI RAKHDINXU MA TIMRO 

 LACHKINY KAAMR KO 36 KO number 
NA LAJAUNA VANNA LAI BADDHAI CHA 
HUNGER MA JAPDAI  XU MANTAR YHA DHERI XA ANTAR 
TIMRO JAWANI DEKHE RA LAAGDAI CHA 
CHAKKR

MA MAYA KO ROGI 
TIMI BANDAUNA 
DOCTOR AHH
 MAYA KO LAGI KATI 
KHADAI CHU THAKKR

HALKA BADY KO JEEUDAL 
MAH  MAKHHA TIMI SIMPLE NAI 
RAMRI NA PARANA NAKAL 

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER
                  X2

KBABI - verse 
NAHANA KTA GUFF MATHI GUFF 
DHERAI AATE GAYE TIMI JASTO CHAKS
RAYAAK LAGI RACHA PACHI PACHI
NAPARANA HASSssâ€¦..

Rinmorin - YOU KNOW WHAT I MEAN !!!

FASDINA MAH JHAL MAH
NAGARANA AASH 
JAY HO TYI VANDINXU MALAI LAGDAINA K LAAJ
MALAI MAAN PARDAINA BOKA HARU 
VANU PARDA KHASS
SAMALYRA RAKHA TIMRO JAWANI KO MAAT

K VAKO KTA HARU KT DEKHI MARNY
JHYAP CHA SIDE MAH CHICKS KO PAXI PARNY KT DEKHNAI HUNNA 
MASKY RA KURA GARNY 
K BOLIDI HALYO VANY FERI
MASKI NAJIK SARNY 

GARO GARO VAKO HOLA 
JAWANI DEKHYRA
CHITTA BUJAU ABO KTA 
TADHAI BATA HERYRA
TIMI JASTO GAFADI YHA KTA HARU
DHERAI CHA THMANAI NASAKNY TESTO KURA MA MAH K RAICHA 

Rinmorin - OH shit !!

KBABI - MAYA KO ROGI VAYE JAAU GARAU CHECK UP 
TIMRO POCKET MONEY LAY AAUDAINA MERO MAKE-UP
SOCHDAI SOCHDINA MA MERO MIND PURAI SETUP 
KBABI TESTO KTA GARDAINA NI DESERVE 

PATAUNA KHOJYA HOLA
PATINY MAH CHAINA
GUFADI KO TRUST UMMM HMM
TESTO KT HOINA
KTA HARKO BANI SABI YESTI TA HO NI 
AAFNO KAAM GARA PACHI NALAGANA
SORRY BROâ€¦.

HOOK *
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER
MERO HOOK TIMI SAMPLE 
TIMRO LOOKS ATII BANGER 
ATOM BOOM VANDA DANGER  
                  X2

snippet.title: Bairan â€“ Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
Thatâ€™s why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.

Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie

hi.title: Bairan â€“ Animated Love Story | Banjaare (Official Video)
hi.description:
Bairan was never meant to be a hit.

We made Bairan for hearts, not for trends, not for reels, not for charts

No label. No big budget. Just two Brothers and a feeling.

We shot a real music video in Chandigarh.
We trusted the wrong person.
And received cheap quality.
That video almost destroyed this song.
So we cancelled everything.
We uploaded only the audio through DistroKid, with no marketing, no plans.
Then something magical happened.
YouTube algorithm picked Bairan.
People started listening.
People started feeling it.
People made it viral.
And suddenly, Bairan was no longer OUR song.
It became YOUR song.
Thatâ€™s why we decided to create this animated music video.
Because when characters are animated, everyone can see themselves in the story.
Every broken heart becomes the hero.
Every lover becomes the character.

This video is dedicated to every person who felt Bairan.
This is your story.
This is your song.


Song Credits: 
Title: Bairan
Singer/Lyricist/Composer: BANJAARE
Music: Roni
Mix-Master: Gurie
Animation : Ham_mah.10

Special Thanks To - Jayant Kamboj , Rajkumari

pt-BR.title: Eu desisto...
pt-BR.description:
Desisto...

O fim do Blox Fruits...!?

Ok, entأ£o escutem, nأ£o cliquem em nenhum link de perfil do Roblox. Se clicarem, isso vai acontecer com vocأھs tambأ©m.
Eu tentei mudar minha senha, mas o cأ³digo nunca chegou. Depois de 1 a 5 minutos, chegou um cأ³digo, mas quando o inseri, apareceu como cأ³digo incorreto. Talvez eu tenha clicado em "reenviar cأ³digo" umas 7 vezes. Alأ©m disso, no vأ­deo, eu disse sem querer que levei de 2 a 3 horas para mudar a senha, mas na verdade o cأ³digo nأ£o funcionou. Depois de 6 a 8 horas, chegou um cأ³digo que funcionou e eu mudei a senha. Depois de mudar a senha, o cأ³digo nأ£o chegou por um dia, depois de 2 a 3 dias e, finalmente, depois de 3 dias أ  noite, tentei pedir o cأ³digo e ele chegou em 1 minuto e eu o mudei. (أ‰ um pouco difأ­cil explicar em inglأھs.) Felizmente, tudo deu certo agora. Hoje, mudei meu 2Security para Auther!

fr-FR.title: J'ai arrأھtأ©...
fr-FR.description:
J'ai arrأھtأ©...

La fin de Blox Fruits...!?

أ‰coutez bien : ne cliquez sur aucun lien de profil Roblox. Si vous le faites, أ§a vous arrivera aussi.

J'ai essayأ© de changer mon mot de passe, mais le code n'arrivait jamais. Au bout de 1 أ  5 minutes, j'ai reأ§u un code, mais il أ©tait incorrect. J'ai dأ» cliquer 7 fois sur آ«آ Renvoyer le codeآ آ». Dans la vidأ©o, je dis par erreur que j'ai changأ© de mot de passe 2 أ  3 heures plus tard, mais le code ne fonctionnait pas. Aprأ¨s 6 أ  8 heures d'attente, j'ai reأ§u un code valide, j'ai changأ© mon mot de passe, puis je n'ai plus reأ§u de code pendant 1 jour, puis 2 ou 3 jours, et enfin 3 jours plus tard, la nuit, j'ai essayأ© de le redemander et il est arrivأ© en 1 minute. Je l'ai changأ©. C'est un peu difficile أ  expliquer en anglais. Heureusement, tout est rentrأ© dans l'ordre maintenant. Aujourd'hui, j'ai changأ© mon deuxiأ¨me mot de passe de sأ©curitأ© en آ«آ Auteurآ آ»آ !

id.title: Saya berhenti...
id.description:
Aku Menyerah...

Akhirnya Blox Fruits..!?

Oke, jadi dengarkan, jangan klik tautan profil Roblox apa pun. Jika kamu mengkliknya, ini akan terjadi padamu juga.
Aku mencoba mengubah kata sandiku, tetapi kodenya tidak pernah datang. 1-5 menit kemudian, 45 menit kemudian datang 1 kode, tetapi aku memasukkan kode tersebut dan muncul pesan kode salah. Mungkin aku mengklik kirim ulang kode 7 kali. + Dalam video, aku tidak sengaja mengatakan 2-3 jam setelah aku mengubah kata sandi. Maksudku, kodenya tidak berfungsi. Kemudian 6-8 jam setelah 6-8 jam, datang 1 kode, kode itu berfungsi. Aku mengubah kata sandi. + Setelah selesai, kodenya tidak pernah datang selama 1 hari, kemudian 2-3 hari, dan kemudian 3 hari di malam hari aku mencoba meminta kode dan kode itu datang dalam 1 menit dan aku mengubahnya. + Agak sulit dijelaskan dalam bahasa Inggris. + Untungnya, semuanya berjalan baik sekarang. + Hari ini aku mengubah keamananku menjadi Author!

+ Gabung Discord Saya di Sini: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

it.title: Ho smesso...
it.description:
Ho smesso...

I frutti di fine Blox...!?

Okey, quindi ascolta, non cliccare su nessun link del profilo Roblox, se lo clicchi, succederأ  anche a te.
Ho provato a cambiare la mia password ma il codice non أ¨ mai arrivato. Dopo 1-5 minuti أ¨ arrivato 1 codice, ma quando l'ho inserito mi ha detto "codice sbagliato", forse ho cliccato 7 volte e ho reinviato il codice + nel video ho detto per sbaglio che dopo 2-3 ore ho cambiato password, cioأ¨ il codice non funzionava. Dopo 6-8 ore أ¨ arrivato 1 codice, funzionava, ho cambiato password + dopo averlo cambiato il codice non أ¨ mai arrivato, poi dopo 2-3 giorni e dopo 3 giorni di notte ho provato a chiedere il codice ed أ¨ arrivato in 1 minuto e l'ho cambiato + un po' difficile da spiegare in inglese + per fortuna ora أ¨ andato tutto bene + oggi ho cambiato il mio 2security in auther!

+ Unisciti al mio Discord qui: https://discord.gg/wmqUbMzQRZ

#bloxfruits #roblox

Okay, also hأ¶rt zu: Klickt bloأں nicht auf Roblox-Profillinks! Wenn ihr das tut, passiert euch das auch. Ich habe versucht, mein Passwort zu أ¤ndern, aber der Code kam erst nach 1-5 Minuten. Nach 45 Minuten kam dann ein Code, aber als ich ihn eingegeben habe, hieأں es, er sei falsch. Ich habe dann bestimmt sieben Mal auf â€‍Code erneut sendenâ€œ geklickt. Im Video habe ich versehentlich gesagt, dass ich das Passwort vor 2-3 Stunden geأ¤ndert habe. Ich meine, der Code hat nicht funktioniert. Nach 6-8 Stunden kam dann endlich ein Code, der funktioniert hat. Ich habe mein Passwort geأ¤ndert. Nachdem ich das getan hatte, kam der Code einen Tag lang nicht, dann wieder 2-3 Tage und schlieأںlich, drei Tage spأ¤ter, nachts habe ich versucht, einen Code anzufordern. Er kam innerhalb einer Minute und ich habe ihn geأ¤ndert. Schwer zu erklأ¤ren auf Englisch. Zum Glأ¼ck ist jetzt alles gut gegangen. Lyrics for "Sia - Cheap Thrills"

[Intro: Sean Paul]
Up with it girl
Rock with it girl
Show dem it girl (Bada bang bang)
Bounce with it girl
Dance with it girl
Get with it girl (Bada bang bang)

[Verse 1: Sia]
Come on, come on, turn the radio on
It's Friday night and I won't be long
Gotta do my hair, I put my make up on
It's Friday night and I won't be long

[Pre-Chorus: Sia (Sean Paul)]
Till I hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
Hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
I got all I need
No, I ain't got cash, I ain't got cash
But I got you baby
(Just you an me)

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Verse 2: Sia]
Come on, come on, turn the radio on
It's Saturday and I won't be long
Gotta paint my nails, put my high heels on
It's Saturday and I won't be long

[Pre-Chorus: Sia (Sean Paul)]
Till I hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
Hit the dance floor (Bada bang)
I got all I need (Sia)
No, I ain't got cash, I ain't got cash

(Just you an me)

(I love cheap thrills!)

(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money

Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money

[Verse 3: Sean Paul & (Sia)]
Me an you, girl, you an me
Drop it to di floor an mek mi see your energy because
Mi nah play nuh hide an seek
Wah fi see di ting you have weg mek me feel weak girl (Free)
'Cause anytime you wine an kotch it
Di selector pull it up an put it pon repeat, girl
I'm nah touch a dollar in mi pocket
'Cause nuttn' in this world ain't more dan what you worth (I love cheap thrills!)

[Bridge: Sia & Sean Paul]
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control
Oh, oh

[Chorus: Sia & Sean Paul]
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
Baby I don't need dollar bills to have fun tonight
(I love cheap thrills!)
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I can feel the beat
Mek di beat jus tek control
I don't need no money
You worth more dan diamonds, more dan gold
As long as I keep dancing
Free up yourself, get outa control

[Outro: Sia]
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)
La, la, la, la, la, la
(I love cheap thrills!)

(I love cheap thrills!)

(I love cheap thrills!)

snippet.title: Zaalima - Arijit Singh | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Valentineâ€™s Special Love Song
snippet.description:
ًں‘‰ًںڈ» SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood Chartbusters - https://bit.ly/3Y1MW0B

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol Deâ€¦
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol Deâ€¦

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

snippet.title: Spending $8,592,587 For The STRONGEST KICK In Roblox!
snippet.description:
Today I broke down doors in Roblox! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. Itâ€™s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX â€” interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything â€” be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer â€œCapture the Flagâ€‌ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (â€œRobuxâ€‌). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Ghum hai kahan, kahan tu?
Khaarijh ye dil
Tune kiya, kiya kyu?

Mohlat iss ishq ka kar de fanaa
Sun saawariya

Sun saawariya kahan tu?
Teri reet main samajh na paau
Teri preet ka charkha liye bas
Ghoom ghoom ghoomta hi rahu

snippet.title: Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! ًںک±
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Opens Most HAUNTED Mystery Containers In Indian Bike Driving 3D! ًںک±

This video is about the Indian Bike Driving 3D game, this is a horror scary story about Mystery Container or Mystery Box In Indian Bike Driving 3D. In this scary story, Franklin meets many ghosts and monsters like Granny, Mr. Meat, Choo Choo Charles, Maya Ek Pisachini, and Scary Teacher. To unlock his own mystery container in Indian Bike Driving 3D, Franklin must invite all these ghosts. Will Franklin survive this horror adventure? What is inside the mystery box of franklin of Indian Bike Driving 3D? Watch the full scary story to find out!

https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

Lyrics:
PALLAVI
Hey nee ayya jagiraa
Chal maavaadochindra
Iga jadthiyyaley | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey aa daar kaa sulthaane
Maa ghar kaa saithaane
Chal shikaar jeyya | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pacha bottu gaayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Gunjukuney nyayamidhi | Aaya sher |
Boodidhala gadda idhi | Aaya sher |
Maatho raayabadda kadhe idhi | Aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

CHARANAM

Aada eeda yeda joodu biddaa
Vanukay puttalinka paditheynay naa needa
Bondha pedutha maliknaina gooda
Vaani saavu raasukochina devuni kaada

Chal udukuthundhi saraa battilo maa kanta thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Iga raaluthadhi bottu bottulo nee panche thade
| Jumbalikay aaya aaya sher |

Jadaluro jadaluro hadaluro dhadaluro
Kodutharo thodaluro theestharo tholuro
Savaariki doruku biddaa
Sevaaley lesthayi biddaa

Pegul dheesi medala yesi
Aadutham biddaa, aadutham biddaa

SECOND PALLAVI

Hey bari batthalunonninraa
Bar baadhey ayinonraa
Nannu peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Hey moldhaaram lenoniraa
Nee kanaa mondonraa
Iga peekuthava | Jumbalikay aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi | Aaya sher |
Mettu mettu ekkuthara | Aaya sher |
Peru pathaa leynonni raa | Aaya sher |
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha | Aaya sher |

Pottu pottu aakalundhi

Peru pathaa leynonni raa
Choosko Paradise ku addresaitha

snippet.title: Unclogging DRAINS to SAVE A CITY from FLOOD!
snippet.description:
Wassup Gamers,

Today I will be Unclogging drains to save a city from a huge flood in Drain Sim gameplay. Can I unclog many plugged street drains in this satisfying simulator game before the whole city is flooded? (They gave me a bucket for this) This is Drain Sim the game!

snippet.title: Pariwartan - Samriddhi Rai
snippet.description:
Pariwartan is a song about hope, dreams and a transformation we've all been waiting for and so deserve. 

Written & performed by Samriddhi Rai 
Music mix and production - Manzil Bikram KC 

Cinematographers - Prashant Mahat, Vikas Ranzitkar, Bibek Magar 
Video Editor - Sobit Magar 
Video Production by Fuzzy Films

What happens when the worlds of gaming, vlogging, and cartoons collide? In todayâ€™s action-packed episode of Indian Bikes Driving 3D, we are heading on a massive mission!

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | WILDCARD | Day 4
snippet.description:
The WILDCARD stage is live.

Teams now battle for one final opportunity to secure their place in the SEMI FINALS. The margin for error is gone and every match carries serious weight.

Only the top 8 teams from this stage will move forward.

One more chance. One more fight. Everything on the line.

Watch the WILDCARD live and see who earns their spot in the SEMI FINALS.

snippet.title: Uniq Poet - Overdue ft. MC Flo
snippet.description:
Artists: Uniq Poet ft. MC Flo
Written by: Uniq Poet & MC Flo
Produced by: Mr. Yoshi (MPC Live 2 & Suno)
Co-Produced, Mixed & Mastered by: Kpass

About the Track
"Overdue" is a collaboration between Uniq Poet and MC Flo, blending lyricism with a soulful, melodic foundation. Produced on the MPC Live 2 with vocal enhancements via Suno, the track represents Uniq Poet and MC Floâ€™s mindset as they traverse through a life where music is a constant battle between internal pressure and external expectation. It serves as a candid reflection on the feeling of having fallen short for the listeners, capturing the moment an artist faces their own perceived delays. MC Flo, a long-standing inspiration and peer on this shared path, enters with a verse that serves as a catalyst, injecting the "can-do" mentality needed to break the silence and pull the narrative back into the light.

â€œEvery line I write is a dedication long overdue!â€‌

Lyrics:

[Verse 1: Andrew Taggart]
Hey, I was doing just fine before I met you
I drink too much and that's an issue, but I'm okay
Hey, you tell your friends it was nice to meet them
But I hope I never see them again

[Pre-Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no calls
Now you're lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Andrew Taggart]
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Verse 2: Halsey]
You look as good as the day I met you
I forget just why I left you, I was insane
Stay and play that blink-182 song
That we beat to death in Tucson, okay

[Pre-Chorus: Halsey, Halsey & Andrew Taggart]
I know it breaks your heart
Moved to the city in a broke-down car
And four years, no call
Now I'm lookin' pretty in a hotel bar
And I-I-I can't stop
No, I-I-I can't stop

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Chorus: Andrew Taggart]
So, baby, pull me closer
In the backseat of your Rover
That I know you can't afford
Bite that tattoo on your shoulder
Pull the sheets right off the corner
Of the mattress that you stole
From your roommate back in Boulder
We ain't ever gettin' older

[Bridge: Andrew Taggart, Halsey, Andrew Taggart & Halsey]
We ain't ever gettin' older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
We ain't ever gettin' older
No, we ain't ever gettin' older

[Drop: Halsey, Halsey & Andrew Taggart]
Older

Lyrics of this song "JUSTIN BIEBER" -
 
Female - 
Ghadi me baje 5 sham ke chore ka na pata thikana
Roley hath me saje jaat ke lambo niche sheher diwana
Ve m rehna tere naal meherma, ve m tere bul di khayal meherma
Mere ve har haal rahega dil ke bhitar tu
Balma ainak kali pehen ke lage justin bieber tu-2

Male - 
Gaadi Aadi tedi chaale 
system maare naam te haale 
Bolero aale maare sale 
Bteyu g weagon te aare
Konsa bole maare aage 
Us bande na dar na laage 
Haryana se hollywood takk
Rukka raoshab ka baaje  
Ham to desi ghee aale
Ye saale khali bore hain
Naam ki gelya leke fere
Katiye pagal hore hain
Re Inki game ghuma rakhi
Lathi 4 chadha rakhi
Ye jo bane fire  hai saap 
Yaar ne been baja rakhi

Female - 
Gaadi lakh dallar ki niche duniya fan bna rakhi
Apna chain mai hari tne mahri neend uda rakhi
Sare deewane mere piche m diwani tere peeche
Pakad le baiyan dil me saiyan teri jagah bna rakhi
Jab chale kaafila caara ka kath challe gel hazara ka
Mne ghana favourite lage jo tu pehne outfit zara ka
O mne krega pagal saiyan mera bne kaatil josa lave ittar tu

O balma ainak kali pehen ke lage justin beiber tu-2

Male - 
Ghne handle kre ilaake yaar tera 
System phaad ke raakhe yaar tera 
Kyi bando ko hazam na hove 
Duniya peeche rakhe yaar tera 

desi chore gaama ke 
Zikar hai mehnge daama me 
Niche chahe g Wagon hai 
FAN HAI AAJ BHI YAMHA KE 

Seedhi seedhi bat h baby
Na kise cheez ki ghaat h baby
Jiske jyada khaaj lagri
Mere pas ilaaj h baby

Jaave mall trackter pe 
Chora kam na kisi bhi actor te Tere shehar m aave raosahab jab
Bawli Jaam lag ja h sector me

Meri Ammi dhunde var mere tayi
Saakh modti chali m
Tere yara ki bhabhi banna teri bnu
gharwali m
Na kisi bat ki fikr krenge maze sath
me zikar krenge
Tere sath hi jana chahti saiyan trip
pe bali m
Haath me rakh hath bawle pyar ki
kar 2 bat bawle
Pache na ho nyu...o balma
O balma ainak kali pehen ke lage

I am Khaleel Present : Escape Papa Pizza's Pizzeria! (SCARY OBBY) â€“ Roblox Horror Escape Gameplay

A brand new pizzeria just opened in townâ€¦ but something feels very wrong. 

Welcome to Escape Papa Pizza's Pizzeria! (SCARY OBBY), a creepy Roblox horror obby where players must escape a terrifying restaurant filled with traps, obstacles, and a deadly secret ingredientâ€¦ HUMAN!

In this scary Roblox adventure, you accidentally get trapped inside Papa Pizzaâ€™s Pizzeria. Now you must complete challenging obby stages, avoid deadly machines, and survive while being chased by the evil chef Papa Pizza. Can you escape before you become the next ingredient in his pizza? 

This game mixes parkour obstacle courses, horror elements, and jump scares, making it one of the most intense escape obby experiences on Roblox. Players must run, jump, and think fast to make it through the pizzeria and reach freedom.

The evil chef Papa Pizza runs the pizzeria and secretly turns people into pizza ingredients, making him the main villain you must avoid while escaping the restaurant.

Will you escape the pizzeria aliveâ€¦ or become the next pizza topping?

Game Features

Scary Roblox Obby Adventure
Mild Jump Scares & Horror Moments
Challenging Parkour Obstacles
Escape From The Evil Chef Papa Pizza
Fun Multiplayer Roblox Gameplay

snippet.title: Bruno Mars - Risk It All [Official Music Video]
snippet.description:
Bruno Mars - Risk It All

The Romantic â€“ the new album from Bruno Mars, available now. Listen now: https://brunomars.lnk.to/TheRomantic

Directed by Bruno Mars & Daniel Ramos

Lyrics: 
For just a chance to win your heart
you could set the bar
beyond the stars
Iâ€™ll do anything anything you ask me to

Say you want the moon watch me learn to fly
Ain't a mountain you could point to i wouldnâ€™t climb
It's crazy but itâ€™s true. Thereâ€™s nothing I won't do. 
Iâ€™d risk it all for you

To hold your hand and call you mine
Iâ€™m trynna be your man
til the end of time
oh iâ€™ll do anything, anything you ask me to

I would run through the fire just to be by your side
if your heartâ€™s on the line you could take mine
It's crazy but itâ€™s true. There's nothing I wonâ€™t do. 
I'd risk it all for you

I would swim across the sea just to show you
sacrifice my life just to hold you
I could go on and on to prove that you belong
here in my arms

Say you want the moon watch me, learn to fly
ainâ€™t a mountain you could point to I wouldnâ€™t climb

It's crazy but itâ€™s true. There's nothing I wonâ€™t do
Iâ€™d risk it all for you (2x)

Join Brunoâ€™s mailing list: https://drop.cobrand.com/d/BrunoMars/Subscribe

Shop Brunoâ€™s official store: https://brunomars.lnk.to/officialstore

Connect with Bruno: 
https://www.tiktok.com/@brunomars
https://www.instagram.com/brunomars
https://www.youtube.com/brunomars
https://x.com/brunomars
https://www.facebook.com/brunomars

https://brunomars.com

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMYآ®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for â€œDie with a Smileâ€‌ with Lady Gaga and â€œAPT.â€‌ with ROSأ‰, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010â€™s â€œJust the Way You Areâ€‌). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMYآ® Awards (including â€œAlbum of the Yearâ€‌ for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.

#BrunoMars #RiskItAll #OfficialMusicVideo

snippet.title: Ganga Ke Kinare | Bunny | Sagar | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record Presents "Ganga Ke Kinare"

Singer - Bunny & Sagar
Music & Compose - Bunny 
Lyrics - Sagar 
Flute - Kiran Vinkar
Mix & Master - Hanish Taneja

Featuring - Dimpy Negi
Director - Alex
Creative Director & DOP - Arshad
Editor - Zipsi
Colourist - Onkar
VFX - Ronak Bindra and Aman Singh bhakuni 
BTS - Shubham rana 
Camera Assitant - Golu
Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha 
Choreographer - Chinu
Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )
Camera & Light- Y-Series Production Lights 
Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith keâ€¦
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith keâ€¦. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke â€¦. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath keâ€¦
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

â–؛ About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripaâ€™s diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.
